programme.title: E26
programme.desc: 《超時空羅曼史》講述了民國功夫巨星向秦羽，因一場意外來到21世紀，與十八線編劇金阿銀相遇，兩人展開了奇妙浪漫又充滿戲劇性的愛情故事。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫

programme.title: E54
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

It aims to connect people, cultures and societies across the East and the West. The program features dynamic designs, fast pace and rich visuals to keep viewers engaged. It also makes use of trending topics online, while focusing on what's relevant in China and the world.

The host presents various culture-related topics in a fun way while also doing some in-depth analysis to give viewers a fuller picture as to what is happening, and why it matters.

programme.title: E8 - AI取代不了翻譯時的情境和情緒
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。

programme.title: E4 - 峽谷草坪音樂會開啟
programme.desc: 五位全新的音樂人梁龍、胡夏、白舉綱、希林娜依·高、黃子弘凡以歌手形象反轉擔任Live House工作人員，以全新的姿態再度開啟這趟音樂旅程。同時，帶著全新口號「總有快樂發聲」，一起共同見證更多生活中的美好與驚喜。

programme.title: E7 - 愛的傳遞
programme.desc: 首檔流浪動物救助情感類真人show，邀請不同領域的嘉賓們成為動物福利中心的義工，照顧流浪動物，給予它們愛心救助、治療與陪伴，最終為它們找到合適的領養人。

programme.title: E23 - 發現腫瘤的蛛絲馬跡
programme.desc: 全新研發的大型互動健康科普節目；從「重治療」到「重預防」，加大醫療健康知識的深度普及，把權威的資訊送到身邊。

programme.title: E22 - 夢會實現 愛會到來
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E2 - Kenya
programme.desc: Robson heads to the east coast of Kenya, where the Indian Ocean offers some of the best game fishing in the world.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: As he starts the final part of his journey deep into Iraq, Michael finds a local school in Baghdad and as he did in North Korea talks to the children about life in Iraq and what they hope to do in the future, and how they see the rest of the world. Michael then visits the ancient site of Babylon, a place he used to read about when he was studying the bible at school. He also gets access to enter the massive palace built by Saddam Hussein that overlooks the historic site.

programme.desc: Robson heads to the east coast of Kenya, where the Indian Ocean offers some of the best game fishing in the world.

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

E10 - Where Every Bloke Knows Your Name
programme.desc: Daphne's attempts to lift Frasier's spirits by taking him to her favorite British pub backfires when Frasier decides to become a regular at “her” hangout.

programme.title: TV Patrol Live[Live]
programme.desc: ABS-CBN's flagship newscast and the country's leading news program in the past two decades, anchored by the most celebrated news team ever assembled in the history of Philippine broadcasting.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: E3 - Island Feast
programme.desc: Off the coast of Oman, summer weather drives nutrients in from the ocean depths where they meet the Arabian sun, causing an explosion of life. Smaller fish spawn, filling the waters with eggs. This creates a buffet predators just can’t resist.

programme.title: E5 - September-October - a Time of Activation
programme.desc: Travel around the world to see another seasonal change unfold. The Northern Hemisphere moves into autumn, while Australia witnesses a rebirth of life, and mating humpbacks fill the warming tropical seas of Tonga.

programme.title: E6 - November-December - Full Circle
programme.desc: Witness some of the most incredible natural events in November, from the millions of Monarch butterflies that converge in Mexico’s forests to the deep fog that shrouds the city of Dubai, signalling the start of winter.

programme.title: Corona Cero New Zealand Pro Championship
Corona Cero New Zealand Pro Championship
HSBC BWF World Tour 2026 DAIHATSU Indonesia Masters -Final Mixed Doubles
Corona Cero New Zealand Pro Championship
Love My Scent
programme.desc: Chang-soo, a guy who has never been in a romantic relationship, earns a magical power after accidentally wearing a perfume he receives from a stranger. The supernatural power he earns is what any man would dream of, an ability to attract every woman in the world! Ara, a woman Chang-soo has been in love with, begins to sense the scent of Chang-soo and falls in love with him. While they gradually grow their connection, Ara's ex-boyfriend, James, suddenly appears and reveals Chang-soo's secret! Will the two people overcome this predicament and find true love in each other?

programme.title: Chaos
programme.desc: In one of the darkest and diverse cultural part in the city, there is a minority group who lives in the place where it is full of despair and frustration. At first glance, their desperate living comprises illegal gambling, prostitution as well as drug-dealing. Indeed, their way of living is guided by their own norms and laws, regardless of the entrenched ones prevailing in the general public. Although their norms are chaotic and arbitrary, they do not violate the existence of the conventional ones. Consequently, it can be said that this chaotic region is unique within the city. On one occasion, there are two men, riding in a vehicle, unexpectedly enter this restricted region...

programme.desc: While the shop flips a Range Rover makeover for rapper Fat Joe, Will and Team Unique turn a new wide body Corvette Z06 into an unusual wide body showpiece.

programme.desc: Richard's gamble of building a '59 Ford F-100 on spec for Shiner Beer may payoff to the tune $150,000, but only if they like the final result.

programme.desc: Jason's journey takes him to Gibson; he rebuilds some iconic instruments that influence the music he loves and uncovers the stories behind them.

programme.desc: With the drivetrain and suspension done, it's now time to focus on what the Polaris will need to stay safe on the trails.

programme.title: Daddy, Father And Papa
programme.desc: As with any other child of his age, seven-years-old Benny takes delight in getting into mischief and is a constant headache to his teachers and classmates. One day, his naughty ways finally led him into serious trouble. A list of triad members has fallen into his hands and he was kidnapped by the notorious gangsters. Thinking it was one of his usual pranks, his dad was undisturbed by Benny's sudden disappearance and made no attempt to trace his whereabouts. However, providence is on Benny's side for a policeman and a reporter are hot pursuit of him, as they both believed Benny to be their son...

programme.title: Action Master: Tony Ching: Royal Tramp
programme.desc: Showboy may be uneducated and the son of a prostitute. But he has tact and ambition. One night he saves Chinese partisans from the ruling Manchus led by Prince Aobai...

programme.title: Final Justice
programme.desc: Cheung Tit-hong has recorded numerous meritorious deeds, but he is by nature uncontrollable and antagonistic to his bureaucratic superiors. Before reporting his work to his superiors, he has already successfully arrested the gangsters who steal motorbikes. He also saved an innocent teacher from being wrongly accused of theft by recognizing a female pickpocket. Finally, he has subdued fierce armed robbers in the gambling casino by flexibly utilizing a car thief, Boy. The contradictions in working style between Cheung and his superiors naturally lead to numerous scenes of strong conflicts...

programme.title: Daddy, Father And Papa
programme.desc: As with any other child of his age, seven-years-old Benny takes delight in getting into mischief and is a constant headache to his teachers and classmates. programme.title: Truant Hero
programme.desc: Police Commandant Wong orders officer Ken to go under cover as a schools teacher. Ken's assignment: to stop the infiltration by Taiwan's underworld. Ken is chosen not on his merit. In fact, he is a coward by nature and a bungler of things by choice. But luck seems to be with him. Just handcuffs on Ball, the notorious Mad Killer. Ken's girl friend Hing has jilted him. Once in school, Ken falls madly in love with the sexy teacher Moon. The students, however, make fun of him. Among his tormentors, student leader Ace stands out. But Hing is also assigned to the school as an undercover student. Very soon, she commands the awe and obedience of all girl students. So, when she is told to locate and protect Doggie, the son of a Taiwan gang leader, she and the girls start to strip all boys off their pants to see if they have a certain birthmark on their behind. The reason: this is the only way to identify Doggie...

programme.title: Action Master: Tony Ching: A Chinese Ghost Story III
programme.desc: One stormy night, a wise High Priest and his student, Fong, pass by the Orchid Temple and realize it is haunted. Here, Fong encounters two lady demons, the seductive Lotus and her hated sister, Butterfly. Although Fong knows his Master wants to capture these evil spirits, he finds himself attracted to the Ghost and allows them to go free. The monks' stay at the Temple is prolonged due to Fong carelessly misplacing their valuable Taolisman, the Gold Suddna. During a trip to the corrupt local town, the High Priest meets Yin by chance and a series of misunderstandings evolve...

But Hing is also assigned to the school as an undercover student. Very soon, she commands the awe and obedience of all girl students. So, when she is told to locate and protect Doggie, the son of a Taiwan gang leader, she and the girls start to strip all boys off their pants to see if they have a certain birthmark on their behind. The reason: this is the only way to identify Doggie...

programme.title: E25 - Animal School Musical
programme.desc: Jake's wish to live in a real live musical comes true, after he knocks the wish granting 'David Coppertrout' out of the Central Stream.

programme.title: Winter Spring Summer Or Fall
programme.desc: Two teenagers on the cusp of adulthood meet and fall in love over four significant days of the year.

programme.title: E4 - West Region Premiere: Nfl's Victor Cruz And Stuntwoman Jessie Graff
programme.desc: The competition heads to the Western Region as new competitors push their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by host and executive producer Dwayne Johnson. In this episode, competitors will compete in a best of three competition where the winner will move on to battle a Pro-Athlete Titan on Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. The top female competitor will face professional stuntwoman and “American Ninja Warrior” star Jessie Graff, while the top man will advance to compete against Super Bowl champion Victor Cruz. Cari Champion and Alex Mendez serve as commentators.

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 講述世界排名第一的拳擊選手李權淑在令全韓國為之瘋狂後突然引退並銷聲匿跡；某一天體育經理人的出現並提出了一個讓她無法拒絕的復出提議，而隨之發生的故事。

programme.title: E26
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 有著「洪吉童」封號的女義賊洪恩祖（南志鉉 飾）專偷貪官的財富，為百姓謀取福祉，怎料在她受到道月大君李烈（文相敏 飾）追捕時，兩人竟然意外互換靈魂！在互換靈魂的期間，兩人拋開成見重新認識彼此，一起攜手守護百姓，最終收穫珍貴的愛情。

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: E7 - Chinese Mystery Snails
programme.desc: In the crystal clear lakes of Northern Wisconsin lurks a peculiar creature... the Chinese Mystery Snail which gets its namesake from female snails giving birth to young, fully developed snails that suddenly and 'mysteriously' appear. Utilized for its high protein, low fat content in China, the mystery snail is a food source believed to aid in treatment of digestive disease. Eager to explore this feral snail as a food source, Yia travels to Clear Lake to meet up with Wisconsin Fisheries Specialist Titus Seilheimer, who's seen first hand the explosion of these snails at his family's lakefront resort.

programme.title: E1 - South Australia
programme.desc: In the first part of the episode, Andy explores sustainable kingfish farming in Spencer Gulf, South Australia, visiting Clean Seas sea farm and preparing fresh kingfish sashimi with the team. Moving to Kangaroo Island, he learns pickling techniques with Kate from Kangaroo Island Source, showcasing her products in a Carne Asada Taco. The episode continues with Andy exploring d'Arenberg's multi-function building and 'The Cube,' experiencing a Chef's Table, and concludes at Wirra Wirra winery, where he cooks Yogurt Flatbread with Olive Oil and Dukka, enjoying it with the staff and their wines.

programme.title: E7 - Brook Trout & Milkweed Flowers
programme.desc: Daniel navigates the rugged terrain of mountain stream beds to fish wild brook trout and forage milkweed flowers for a camp meal hard won from the wild.

programme.title: E13 - Food
programme.desc: In this food-filled episode, Catfish throws up all over the world. The biking duo try various forms of genitalia including bull testicle, tiger and sea penis, virgin eggs, otherwise known as pee billed eggs, and more. They try duck head in China and worm tequila and mosquito eggs in Mexico. The question becomes, can you keep it down while watching this special episode?

programme.desc: In the first part of the episode, Andy explores sustainable kingfish farming in Spencer Gulf, South Australia, visiting Clean Seas sea farm and preparing fresh kingfish sashimi with the team. Moving to Kangaroo Island, he learns pickling techniques with Kate from Kangaroo Island Source, showcasing her products in a Carne Asada Taco. The episode continues with Andy exploring d'Arenberg's multi-function building and 'The Cube,' experiencing a Chef's Table, and concludes at Wirra Wirra winery, where he cooks Yogurt Flatbread with Olive Oil and Dukka, enjoying it with the staff and their wines.

programme.title: E7 - Chinese Mystery Snails
programme.desc: In the crystal clear lakes of Northern Wisconsin lurks a peculiar creature... the Chinese Mystery Snail which gets its namesake from female snails giving birth to young, fully developed snails that suddenly and 'mysteriously' appear. Utilized for its high protein, low fat content in China, the mystery snail is a food source believed to aid in treatment of digestive disease. Eager to explore this feral snail as a food source, Yia travels to Clear Lake to meet up with Wisconsin Fisheries Specialist Titus Seilheimer, who's seen first hand the explosion of these snails at his family's lakefront resort.

programme.title: E1 - Vietnam
programme.desc: From long forgotten wars that decimated a Hindu empire to the ingenuity of its common people, learn about the violent history and tenacity of the Vietnamese.

Reviving Switzerland's Isolated Villages
programme.desc: Only about 650 people live year-round in the Onsernone Valley in Switzerland. Surrounded by picturesque but rugged nature, life here is not easy for the inhabitants. And one of the top priorities is ensuring the availability of medical care.

programme.title: Small Pacific Islands With A Big Strategy
programme.desc: The Pacific is a strategic location for big powers, but Pacific Island countries are using power competition to their advantage. They strike smart deals and join forces - all while facing an existential threat.

programme.title: E1 - Colors, Shapes & Numbers!
programme.desc: It's time to learn all about colors, shapes & numbers with Twinkle! First, learn how to count with Twinkle as she finds five balloons in the colors red, blue, green, yellow & purple! Then, join Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to make sandcastles, learning different shapes like squares, triangles & circles. The learning continues as Twinkle & her friends build & count a beautiful tower of rainbow stones & discover the variety of shapes that clouds can take in the sky!

programme.title: E2 - Pirate Songs & Fun Beach Games!
programme.desc: Ahoy, mateys! Join JJ for pirate songs & fun beach games! The adventure begins when JJ & Wally play pirates on the high seas but can't agree on where to find the hidden treasure! Then, when a wave washes away their sandcastle, a little crab helps them try again to build one that's nearly indestructible. The pirate fun continues as Wally tries to swipe JJ's five little duckies during bath time, leading to a sudsy chase to find the ducknapper!

programme.title: E2 - Drawing, Painting, Music & A Quick Fix!
programme.desc: The Minibods are having a day of drawing, painting, music & a quick fix! Newt is drawing a beautiful flower but keeps rushing & crumpling her drawings, so she must learn to slow down. Then, when the Minibods help her finish a huge painting, Newt wants it all for herself! The creative chaos continues as Lulu struggles to make a music video with a marching Oddbird & Bubbles accidentally makes a mess while trying to fix a book dispenser.

programme.title: E9 - My Hero, A Story, A Teddy & Greens!
programme.desc: The Minibods are learning about heroes, sharing, honesty & eating greens! When Lulu loses her favorite bunny, Bubbles comes to the rescue & becomes her personal superhero! Then, Jeff is excited to read a new book but refuses to include his friends, so he must learn the joy of sharing a story. The lessons continue as Pogo accidentally ruins Newt's teddy-shaped hedge & learns to tell the truth, & Fuse finds the courage to eat his healthy Oddsprouts!

programme.title: E3 - Magic Pets Football Fun!
programme.desc: Join Morphle, Mila, and Jordie as they face off against the Magic Pets in a wild soccer match! With Incra and Telepup using their powers, Team Morphle will have to get creative to win the trophy. It’s a magical, winner-take-all game!

programme.title: E1 - Colors, Shapes & Numbers!
programme.desc: It's time to learn all about colors, shapes & numbers with Twinkle! First, learn how to count with Twinkle as she finds five balloons in the colors red, blue, green, yellow & purple! Then, join Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to make sandcastles, learning different shapes like squares, triangles & circles. The learning continues as Twinkle & her friends build & count a beautiful tower of rainbow stones & discover the variety of shapes that clouds can take in the sky!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E35 - A Visit To Capbreton
programme.desc: Discovering Capbreton. Meetings with fishermen, divers, and local enthusiasts; a focus on the history of the pier and the mystery of the marine abyss, followed by a local ceviche recipe.

programme.title: E1 - Jim Kylam (Montreuil)/Pony And Pierre Sauvage (Montreal)
programme.desc: Richard Orlinski meets the self-taught visual artist Jim Kylam, in his studio in Montreuil, on the outskirts of Paris. Invitation to a free interpretation of his works, which combine symbols and ideograms. In Quebec, immersion in Montreal's artistic hub: Pony transforms his personal experiences into heart-warming creations, notably through his 'toutous'; Pierre Sauvage is passionate about urban art and founded a clothing brand that combines art and social commitment, in collaboration with local artists.

programme.title: E1 - The Selection
programme.desc: In this first episode, guides and experts select the future members of the expedition team. Over the course of two days, the candidates gather in Kandersteg and are put through their paces!

programme.title: E129
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E10 - Velvet In The Voice/The Ajoie Bistro
programme.desc: A portrait of Cyrielle Formaz, aka Meimuna, a talented Valaisan singer, followed by an immersive visit to Les Deux Clefs brewery in Porrentruy.

programme.title: E1 - Bastogne
programme.desc: To pay tribute to one of the most memorable moments in Belgian history, the Battle of the Bulge, Nathalie Guirma heads to Bastogne. Here the locals celebrate the American heroes who came to rescue the city encircled during the German counter-offensive, eighty years ago.

programme.title: E1 - Bastogne
programme.desc: To pay tribute to one of the most memorable moments in Belgian history, the Battle of the Bulge, Nathalie Guirma heads to Bastogne. Here the locals celebrate the American heroes who came to rescue the city encircled during the German counter-offensive, eighty years ago.

programme.title: E5 - In Search Of New Routes
programme.desc: The CAS women's expedition team heads to Valais. In Champex-Lac, they learn rope techniques and climb routes that are rarely used.

programme.title: E8 - Once Upon A Time In Alaska
programme.desc: Diego Bunuel travels to Alaska to witness the migration of wild salmon. Every summer, 200 million salmon return from the Pacific to Alaska's rivers to spawn. The event is strictly regulated by fishing quotas for the many American fishermen.

programme.title: E35 - Pond-Life
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: E22 - My Favourite Flower
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: E708 - Road Trip: Screen Queen
programme.desc: When the Louds' road trip takes them to Hollywood, Lola is determined to become a star and land a leading role.

programme.title: E519 - Dad Reputation / Dream a Lily Dream
programme.desc: While playing in her Dad's new band, Luna is worried about her reputation if her friends see her perform. // Lisa discovers the only way to stop Lily's nightmares is to go inside her dreams and fight them herself.

programme.title: E405 - The Haunting of Flim Flam House / Rube Tube
programme.desc: Patrick and Squidina help the Flim-Flam brothers hunt the ghost that haunts their house. // On her day off from the Patrick Show, Squidina helps Rube produce his TV show.

programme.title: E223 - Ask Away-Way with Lay Lay
programme.desc: As class president, Sadie gets to host the announcements, and Lay Lay comes on the show as the advice expert. But, students start to get upset when the advice the girls give cause unnecessary fallout.

programme.title: E213 - Opposite Universe
programme.desc: Henry and Charlotte are transported into an opposite universe where Ray and Schwoz are evil and want to destroy Piper. They must stop Evil Ray and Evil Schwoz and figure out how to get back to their universe.

programme.title: E107 - The Birthweek Song
programme.desc: Tori struggles to find the perfect birthday gift for Trina, then decides to write her sister a song as a present. An ungrateful Trina turns the song into cash by selling it, enraging Tori.

programme.title: E231 - My Leg! / Ink Lemonade
programme.desc: Now that Fred's leg has healed up, SpongeBob is determined to keep it out of harm's way...no matter what! // Patrick's lemonade stand isn't doing too well...until he gets a secret ingredient from Squidward!

programme.title: E194 - Patrick! The Game / The Sewers of Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: Patrick invents a new board game, and invites SpongeBob, Sandy and Squidward to play it with him. // After accidentally flushing Mr. Krabs’ safe, SpongeBob and Squidward must go into the sewers to find it.

programme.title: E210 - Party All The Crime
programme.desc: After Chloe's birthday party is cancelled, Max and Phoebe compete to throw her a new one. When Max's time-stopping birthday gift falls into the wrong hands, he must work with Phoebe to stop some party poopers from ruining Chloe's birthday.

programme.title: E331 - The Green Tentacle
programme.desc: Sandy seeks Squidward's help to heal her sick tree, but his alternative gardening methods give her a headache.

programme.title: E422 - Up The Stairs!
programme.desc: When a local celebrity chef comes to Junk-N-Stuff to do his live show, Kid Danger and Captain Man are forced to hike a half a mile up the Man Stairs so they can be on the show.

programme.title: Omg 2
programme.desc: A father confronts a rigid school and his own beliefs after his son is expelled for a viral video, sparking a clash over discipline and truth. Release Year: 2023 Director: Amit Rai Awards: 2024 Winner Filmfare Award- Best Story- Amit Rai

programme.title: Hum Do Humare Do
programme.desc: An orphan man's life takes a hilarious turn when he decides to hire a duo, who share a past, to fake being his parents in an attempt to fulfil his lover's wish of marrying someone with a family. Release Year: 2021 Director: Abhishek Jain
